headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of DoorDash (DASH)
summary: DoorDash’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 31.7% of its value and falling to $179.75 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: FedEx pilots to vote on tentative contract after union endorsement
summary: A tentative contract agreement between FedEx and its unionized pilot has cleared another hurdle. The post FedEx pilots to vote on tentative contract after union endorsement appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Uber Eats launches retail returns feature
summary: Uber Eats has added returns service for retail goods purchased through its app, becoming the first delivery app to do returns. The post Uber Eats launches retail returns feature appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Spiking FedEx, UPS fuel fees are grabbing shippers’ attention
summary: Customers are looking more deeply at their surcharge spend levels following a record-high quarter for ground delivery costs, per the TD Cowen/AFS Freight Index.

raw.headline: Spiking FedEx, UPS fuel fees are grabbing shippers’ attention

headline: Uber Eats has a fix for pesky returns. You can just sit on the couch
summary: The Uber Eats return pickup feature applies to items bought through the app from Best Buy, Dick's Sporting Goods, Petco and more.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: A ceasefire, but no Strait talk
summary: A 10-day truce between Isreal and Lebanon takes negotiators another step closer to a broader Middle East peace agreement.
